name: publicWeb_getStats
description: Returns run statistics for a kennel's public stats page. All hashers with a non-removed relationship to the kennel (removed = 0) are included regardless of IsMember flag — both registered members and followers/visitors appear. Display name uses the kennel-specific hash name when set, falling back to the hasher's global hash name, then the computed DisplayName. Returns two rowsets: Rowset 0 is a HasherCount sentinel that prevents a false 404 when the kennel exists but has no hashers yet; Rowset 1 contains the hasher stat rows. No authentication required.

parameters.name: PublicKennelId
parameters.description: The kennel's public UUID, cast to UNIQUEIDENTIFIER internally. Passed as a string to allow the unauthenticated HTTP shim to forward query-string parameters without type conversion.

rowsets.name: HasherCountSentinel
rowsets.description: Always returns exactly 1 row when the kennel is found and active. An empty rowset (0 rows) signals kennel-not-found and the shim returns 404. Prevents a false 404 when the kennel exists but has no hashers yet.

columns.name: HasherCount
columns.description: COUNT(*) of all non-removed hasher relationships (removed = 0), regardless of IsMember flag. May be 0 for a brand-new kennel.

rowsets.name: HasherStats
rowsets.description: One row per hasher with a non-removed relationship to the kennel and at least one run recorded (HcTotalRunCount + HistoricalTotalRunCount > 0), ordered by RollingYearRuns DESC, TotalRuns DESC. May be empty for a new kennel.

columns.name: Rank
columns.description: ROW_NUMBER() over the default sort (RollingYearRuns DESC, TotalRuns DESC). Clients that re-sort client-side should recompute rank locally.

columns.name: DisplayName
columns.description: COALESCE(KennelHashName, HashName, DisplayName) — kennel-specific hash name first, global hash name second, computed full name third.

columns.name: TotalRuns
columns.description: HcTotalRunCount + HistoricalTotalRunCount — all HC-tracked runs plus pre-HC historical runs.

columns.name: TotalHaring
columns.description: HcHaringCount + HistoricalHaringCount — all HC-tracked hares set plus pre-HC historical haring.

columns.name: YtdRuns
columns.description: YtdTotalRunCount — runs in the current calendar year, maintained by the portal.

columns.name: YtdHaring
columns.description: YtdHaringCount — hares set in the current calendar year.

columns.name: RollingYearRuns
columns.description: COALESCE(RollingYearTotalRunCount, 0) — runs in the last 365 days. Nullable in older records; defaults to 0.

columns.name: RollingYearHaring
columns.description: COALESCE(RollingYearHaringCount, 0) — hares set in the last 365 days. Nullable in older records; defaults to 0.

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change the empty-rowset-means-404 contract on Rowset 0
Never change the COALESCE order for DisplayName — callers depend on kennel-specific name taking precedence
